cve:IRM.cve:Title: CVEnumGeGENC33-4
cve:IRM.cve:Description: GENC Geopolitical Entity codes (country codes) sorted alphabetically.

cve:Term.cve:Description: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
Territory of Heard Island and McDonald Islands
Federation of Saint Kitts and Nevis
Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands
Pitcairn, Henderson, Ducie, and Oeno Islands
Independent State of Papua New Guinea
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Saint Helena, Ascension, and Tristan da Cunha
Territorial Collectivity of Saint Pierre and Miquelon
Democratic Republic of Sao Tome and Principe
Territory of Ashmore and Cartier Islands
